mapper.select: SELECT id, perm_code, perm_name, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_permission ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, perm_code, perm_name, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_permission WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, perm_code, perm_name, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_permission WHERE perm_code = #{permCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission (perm_code, perm_name, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{permCode}, #{permName}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_permission SET perm_name = #{permName}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
